Container.Name: dns-monitoring
Container.Overview: DNS Monitoring - Self-hosted DNS query monitoring and analytics. Deployed via docker-compose from GitHub source
Container.Description:
DNS Monitoring - Self-hosted DNS query monitoring and analytics web application
DEPLOYMENT METHOD: GitHub + docker-compose (no Docker Hub required)
Quick Start via SSH:
1. SSH into Unraid: ssh root@Avengers
2. Clone the repository: mkdir -p /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring git clone https://github.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring.git .
3. (Optional) Edit docker-compose.prod.yml: - Change port: modify "3000:80" to your desired port - Configure IP: set static IP in docker-compose.prod.yml - Adjust environment variables as needed
4. Start services: docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d
5. Access Web UI: http://YOUR_UNRAID_IP:3000
FEATURES: - Real-time DNS query monitoring and logging - React-based web dashboard - Express.js REST API backend - SQLite database for persistent storage - Query analytics and reporting - Fully configurable via environment variables - Production-ready docker-compose setup
DATA PERSISTENCE: - Database: /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring/data/dns-monitoring.db - All project files: /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring/
MANAGING THE CONTAINER:
View Logs: cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring && docker-compose logs -f
Stop: cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring && docker-compose down
Restart: cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring && docker-compose restart
Restart with Rebuild: cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring && docker-compose down && docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d
Update to Latest: cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring git pull origin main docker-compose down docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d
Remove Everything: cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring docker-compose down -v cd /mnt/user/appdata && rm -rf dns-monitoring
ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES (customize in docker-compose.prod.yml): - NODE_ENV: Node.js environment (production/development) - CORS_ORIGIN: CORS origin for API requests - DEFAULT_DNS_SERVER: Primary DNS server (default: 1.1.1.1 Cloudflare) - QUERY_TIMEOUT_MS: DNS query timeout in milliseconds - LOG_LEVEL: Application log level (debug/info/warn/error) - QUERY_RETENTION_DAYS: How long to keep query history
GITHUB REPOSITORY: https://github.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring
SUPPORT: https://github.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring/issues

Config.Name: Host Port
Config.Description: Web UI port (change to your desired port like 8080)

Config.Name: Retention_Days
Config.Description: Days to keep DNS query history
